parameters.subject: =Payment Reminder: Invoice #{{ $json.InvoiceNumber }} is Overdue
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $json.ClientName.split(' ')[0] || $json.ClientName }},

This is a friendly reminder that Invoice #{{ $json.InvoiceNumber }} for {{ $json.TotalAmount }} was due on {{ $json.DueDate }} and is now {{ $json.DaysOverdue }} day(s) overdue.

Kindly arrange the payment at the earliest to avoid any disruption to your services.

If you've already made the payment, please disregard this email.

Thank you,
Ivyside AI Private Limited
vaishnav@ivyside.in
